title: Degraded mode — no incident identified, just wants template
code_snippet:
# User says: 'Can you help me set up a post-mortem process for our team?'
# No specific incident. Wants a template and process guide.
expected_feedback: Degraded: Planning mode — no incident data. Cannot produce any incident-specific content. Can provide post-mortem template, process guide, severity framework, and review checklist. Must stop at Gate 1 (Incident Context Collection) for any incident-specific work.
coverage_rules: STOP if no incident is identified
